notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Correa reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Trevor Story. Isaac Paredes to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Roman Anthony pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Roman Anthony homers (1) on a line drive to left center field.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Correa reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Correa reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Trevor Story. Isaac Paredes to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Isaac Paredes plunked
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Paredes hit by pitch. Yordan Alvarez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Correa GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Correa grounds into a double play, third baseman Caleb Durbin to second baseman Isiah Kiner-Falefa to first baseman Willson Contreras. Yordan Alvarez to 3rd. Isaac Paredes out at 2nd. Carlos Correa out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Correa rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Correa grounds into a double play, third baseman Caleb Durbin to second baseman Isiah Kiner-Falefa to first baseman Willson Contreras. Yordan Alvarez to 3rd. Isaac Paredes out at 2nd. Carlos Correa out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Yordan Alvarez plunked
notableEvents.detail: Yordan Alvarez hit by pitch. Jose Altuve to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Cam Smith steals (2) 2nd base. Cam Smith to 3rd. Cam Smith advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Connor Wong.

notableEvents.label: Joey Loperfido pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joey Loperfido walks. Jake Meyers to 2nd.
